title: PaperResources
description: Load multiple resource packs instead of merging them!
body:
# PaperResources 📃
Let the minecraft client handle merging your resource packs natively. This paper plugin takes advantage of new features to tell players that join to load in multiple server resource packs!

# Setup 🛠️
When the plugin loads up for the first time your can specify resource pack zip links on each line in `/plugins/PaperResources/resources.txt` and simply run `/paperresources reload` for your changes to take affect! This plugin works best if `resource-pack` in `server.properties` is left empty.

# Developer API 🌐
v2+ Includes access to the PaperResources API under the `PaperResourcesManager` class. JavaDocs are included with every release.
